description: Transform extracted coefficients into the required function call JSON format with wrapped array values

inputs.name: coefficients
inputs.description: Dictionary containing quadratic coefficients with keys a, b, c and integer values

output.description: Returns function call in required format: [{'algebra.quadratic_roots': {'a': [1], 'b': [-3], 'c': [2]}}]

workflow_spec.name: Generate Quadratic Function Call
workflow_spec.description: Parse user query to extract quadratic equation coefficients and generate appropriate function call in the required JSON format
